error_signature: Client ID and Client Secret fields disappear
title: Google OAuth2 fields not displaying in n8n
symptom: When attempting to create Google OAuth2 credentials, the Client ID and Client Secret fields briefly appear and then disappear, preventing authentication.
not_this_if: Fields are visible in other credential types
root_cause: The issue is caused by the presence of the environment variable `N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE` in the Docker configuration, which interferes with the display of the credential fields in the n8n interface.
fix_steps: Remove the `N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE` environment variable from your Docker run command or docker-compose file
agent_instruction: Remove the `N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE` variable and restart the n8n server.
